# Vendored assets

Static copies of third-party fonts and icons so the dashboard works fully offline and on GitHub Pages without CDN requests.

| Path | Source | License |
|------|--------|---------|
| `tabler-icons/` | [@tabler/icons-webfont@3.34.0](https://tabler.io/icons) | MIT |
| `fonts/` | [DM Mono](https://fonts.google.com/specimen/DM+Mono), [Syne](https://fonts.google.com/specimen/Syne) | SIL OFL 1.1 |

To refresh after an upgrade, re-download from the URLs pinned in the project release notes or re-run the vendor script in the maintainer docs.
